case_title: SEDAN OPERATORS COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA DE SOTO CAB VS MEDCALFE, MIKE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,334.90 FILED BY SEDAN OPERATORS COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA DE SOTO CAB CO., A CORP. R/O AS TO DEFENDANT MEDCALFE, MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDCALFE, MIKE
LETTER FROM NANCY METCALFE STATING THAT SHE WAS SERVED W/ A CLAIM FOR MIKE MEDCALFE WHICH HE DID NOT RESIDE AT THE ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEDAN OPERATORS COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA DE SOTO CAB CO., A CORP. R/O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDCALFE, MIKE $1,334.90 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,399.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MEDCALFE, MIKE HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-08-1995, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-19-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-10-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON MOTION TO VACATE TO MIKE MEDCALFE RETURNED, NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEDAN OPERATORS COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA DE SOTO CAB CO., A CORP. R/O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDCALFE, MIKE $800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, 1ST PYMT $400 DUE ON 5-1-95, 2ND PYMT OF $400 DUE ON 7-1-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MEDCALFE, MIKE
